column3: Delivery of clean and potable water to residential. Charges are based on the volume of water consumed, measured in cubic meters (m³) using water meters. It covers water for drinking, cooking, cleaning, and sanitation needs.
Removal and treatment of wastewater generated from households. Charges are calculated based on the amount of water used in cubic meters(m³).

Supply of electrical energy to power appliances, lighting, heating, and other systems in residential settings. Electricity consumption is measured in kilowatt-hours (kWh), and charges are applied based on the energy used during a billing period.
Supply of natural gas to households for cooking, heating, and water heating purposes. Gas consumption is measured in cubic meters (m³) and is billed based on actual usage.

This service covers the upkeep, cleaning, and minor repairs of shared spaces in residential buildings. It includes areas such as hallways, staircases, elevators, lobbies, parking areas, and courtyards. The charges are calculated per square meter of the shared property.
This service handles the collection, transportation, and disposal of solid waste from residential  premises. Charges are applied per person.
